Froglok Skin Mask  
 

Lore Item
Slot: FACE
AC: 2
DEX: +2 INT: +2
WT: 0.4 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except RNG DRU MNK BRD BST
Race: DEF TRL OGR GNM FRG
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Froglok Skin Mask
Lore Item
Slot: FACE
AC: 2
DEX: +2 INT: +2
WT: 0.4 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except RNG DRU MNK BRD BST
Race: DEF TRL OGR GNM FRG
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:1 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:53
Submitted By:Sluglug
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 02:30:09
Page Updated:Mon Nov 11th, 2019

Expansion: Original
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 7
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Froglok Skin Mask

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Grobb

Froglok Skin Mask screenshot, Phinigel server, Velious era

Uploaded September 28th, 2016 by __DEL__1708906592452
Updated November 11th, 2019
Send a correction
Post Comment
able to attain at level 7
QuoteReply
# Sep 28 2016 at 3:06 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1708906592452
Scholar
26 posts
Was able to attain Froglok Skin Mask at level 7 (Phinigel server, Velious Era). The Spore Guardian who dropped it conned red and was worth 4% experience, couldn't have done it without Harm Touch and a pet. Quest dialogue:

You say, 'Hail, Treskar'
Treskar says 'You dare speak to Master Treskar! You be [sent by Hukulk] or you be hurtin'! Me have no time to waste with ugly one like you!'
You say, 'I was sent by Hukulk'
Treskar says 'Ha! Hukulk accept puny troll now?! Ha! You join us and you join fight. Nightkeep enemy is Vitriolenne enemy! You help smash [other weak shadowknights]. Them weak. We true power! You bash good and maybe you do [secret mission] for Treskar.'
You say, 'What secret mission?'
Treskar says 'Nightkeep hear bashers see fungus man spore guardian at Innothule. Him protect young fungus man spores so they grow big, BIG an' attack trolls! You go find spore guardian. Smash his big red head! Bring Treskar that huge mushroom head of his to prove he walk no more. You do this and me give you froglok skin mask.'
[Give Huge Mushroom Head to Treskar.]
Treskar says 'You do it! You am great knight. Me give you special froglok skin mask. Shaman make for Nightkeep. It am make you smarter like Treskar... Me tink so!'
[Receive Froglok Skin Mask]
Your faction standing with Shadowknights of Night Keep has been adjusted by 20.
Your faction standing with Green Blood Knights has been adjusted by -3.
Your faction standing with Broken Skull Clan has been adjusted by -5.
Your faction standing with DaBashers has been adjusted by 1.
You gain experience!!
You receive 5 copper from Treskar.
You receive 9 silver from Treskar.
You receive 4 gold from Treskar.
▲ Page top
Dem Trolies just 'aving funz
QuoteReply
# Jan 02 2003 at 9:15 PM Rating: Good
Valdon
674 posts
whats wrong with you people? so what if he wants to type troll. sheesh, hes having fun - game=fun. I have seen some very informative post posted in silly talk, I have also seen people post with flawless grammar and say zero that ment anything to me, and was useless.

Edited, Thu Jan 2 21:02:14 2003

· 'Valdon Gravedancer' Terris-Thule. Dwarven Cleric 34th circle.
· 'Junglebug Sugarpants' Terris-Thule. Halfling Druid. 52nd season.
· 'Shinook Eldergod' Terris-Thule. Troll Shaman of 32nd rite.
· 'Soultree Vixen' Terris-Thule. Woodelf Ranger of 34th season.
▲ Page top
Easy ????
QuoteReply
# Apr 05 2002 at 3:32 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591777027666
3 posts
My troll beastlord ran across him and killed him with ease he conned yellow, he did stunn me once but pet got to him and stunn keprt me out of range of his hits. Weather it was luck i don't know but it was pretty easy to kill him. And troll is not twink he just has the first quest armor stuff and drop items on me so if a 9 untwink can hadle most will find this easy.
▲ Page top
SK faction
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2002 at 6:34 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592252985500
3 posts
My troll Shaman didn't appear to have the faction with the SK's - Treskar wouldn't even tell me the whole story behind the quest, so I didn't bother handing him the head.

Anyone know offhand how to raise faction with the SK guild?
▲ Page top
RE: SK faction
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2002 at 4:02 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756654003
8 posts
Give 4 bone chips to Hukulk...raises Trollie SK but lowers Oggie SK factions.

Do the Trollie Beastymaster quest...gives positive hit to Trollie SK and Troll BST no negatives.

Not a lot of options for quests in Grobb.

"If at first you don't succeed, forget skydiving!" Anon....
▲ Page top
No erudite?
QuoteReply
# Sep 19 2001 at 10:42 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592347883860
5 posts
This can be worn by DEs but not Erudite? Why, or has this been updated? Seen the same thing on a couple other Grobb/Oggok quest items.
Would be nice if my Erud SK could use some of these.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jul 26 2001 at 4:51 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ok obviously someone isnt the brightest star in the sky are we krinkobo? imbred means the offspring of two parebts who are already related, and seeing as how half elfs are half human, half wood elf where do you get the idea that they're imbred(THEY CANT BE), next time think before you run your mouth or you'll end up lookin stupid, AGAIN!!!
RE: KRINKOBO
QuoteReply
# Apr 01 2002 at 2:59 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592250247578
92 posts
Heh...by the way, Half Elves are Half human, half wood, high, OR dark elf... just take a look at some of the cultural armor for proof.

#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 18 2001 at 1:39 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Guards don't care for 1/2 elves because they are inbreed freaks.
Nugek

# May 26 2001 at 11:41 AM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
I killed the mushroom guy when he was still yellow, but I did have high lvl druid buffs on me. (:
▲ Page top
The spawning time
QuoteReply
# May 25 2001 at 10:06 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The Spore Guardian appears only after you asked for the quest. If someone kill it before you, you must go back to speak with Treskar for the Quest.

The Spore Guardian spawn beside Guk entrance, many people say that you must kill all spores of the zone to increase the spawning time :)

Druzilla
Necromancer of the Executeurs
▲ Page top
Strengh of the Guardian
QuoteReply
# May 25 2001 at 10:00 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Be careful, the Spore Guardian has a very good stun effect !

Druzilla

# May 25 2001 at 1:52 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
My 1/2 elf warrior killed the guardian just outside of Guk. Dont know if thats a normal spot or not. Only time I have ever seen him.
Left the head on it for the 1st troll to walk by to loot. Some reason the Grobb gaurds dont care for Half elves. =)
